author: lOrm
content: Approach A — deletion. streaming.rs (841 LOC, 35 tests) had exactly 1 external caller: the From<crate::streaming::TokenUsage> impl in session/state.rs (lines 50-58), which was itself never invoked (zero grep hits). Deleted streaming.rs, removed pub mod streaming from lib.rs, removed the dead From impl from session/state.rs. cargo build clean, cargo fmt --check clean, clippy errors in confabulation.rs/lsp.rs are pre-existing at HEAD.
